plugins.name: Analytics & Reports
plugins.description: Dashboard analytics, print statistics, and scheduled report generation with email delivery.
plugins.author: MeshSilo

plugins.name: Backups & Cloud
plugins.description: Database backup and restore with cloud replication support for S3, Dropbox, Google Drive, and OneDrive.
plugins.author: MeshSilo

plugins.name: Demo Mode
plugins.description: Demo accounts, sample 3D models, and periodic reset for demonstration instances.
plugins.author: MeshSilo

plugins.name: Hello World
plugins.description: A simple test plugin to verify the plugin system is working correctly.
plugins.author: MeshSilo

plugins.name: OpenSCAD Integration
plugins.description: Import OpenSCAD (.scad) files, edit parameters via a visual form, and export as STL or 3MF. Requires OpenSCAD installed on the server or the optional Docker container.
plugins.author: MeshSilo

plugins.name: 3D Printing Tools
plugins.description: Print queue, printer profiles, slicer integration, GCode parsing, cost calculator, and mesh analysis.
plugins.author: MeshSilo

plugins.name: Retention Policies
plugins.description: Automated data retention policies, archiving rules, and legal hold management.
plugins.author: MeshSilo

plugins.name: Real User Monitoring
plugins.description: Client-side performance monitoring and page load analytics.
plugins.author: MeshSilo

plugins.name: Single Sign-On
plugins.description: External authentication via OIDC, SAML, LDAP/AD, SCIM provisioning, and OAuth2 provider. Adds SSO buttons to the login page and a unified SSO admin panel.
plugins.author: MeshSilo

plugins.name: Teams
plugins.description: Team collaboration with shared model access and team invitations.
plugins.author: MeshSilo

plugins.name: Webhooks
plugins.description: HTTP webhook notifications for application events with retry support.
plugins.author: MeshSilo
